LAW AND MOTION 301, FEB-05-2026 RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' MEMORANDUM OF COSTS. THE SUBJECT MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' MEMORANDUM OF COSTS IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Memorandum Of Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.'S Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Memorandum Of Costs.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Xavier Pablo Hozven, Esq., of Quill & Arrow LLP, (310) 933-4271, for Plaintiffs.

Yamili F. Gonzalez, Esq., of Squire Patton Boggs LLP, (213) 624-2500, for Defendant.

The subject matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to strike plaintiffs' memorandum of costs is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to Dept. 301 a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
